caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Waves Impact Western Caribbean Ports
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing moderate winds sustained at 24 knots with wave heights reaching 5.8 feet and a dominant northeast swell period of 8 seconds. Rain probability remains elevated at 59 percent, while San Juan reports lighter winds near 14 knots with less significant marine impacts.

mediterranean.headline: Moderate Winds and Elevated Seas Impact Mykonos Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing sustained winds up to 23 kt with wave heights reaching 7.4 ft and a dominant swell from the NNE at an 8-second period. Rain chances remain low at 30 percent while Haifa sees slightly lighter winds near 21 kt, indicating moderate marine conditions across the eastern Mediterranean.
